name: Barbecued Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut chicken into pieces; cut each breast half into halves.
2. Arrange chicken skin sides up and thickest parts to the outside in an oblong baking dish, 12 x 7 x 2-inches.
3. In a glass measuring cup, mix remaining ingredients.
4. Microwave uncovered on high (100%) for 3 minutes; stir.
5. Continue microwaving until mixture boils and thickens, about 2 to 3 minutes.
6. Pour sauce over chicken.
7. Cover loosely and microwave on high (100%) for 10 minutes.
8. Rearrange chicken and baste with sauce.
9. Cover loosely and continue microwaving until chicken is done, 10-15 minutes, basting with sauce every 5 minutes.
